title: cholrot: Rank-one Cholesky update/downdate routines for Python/C++
description: cholrot is a small experimental NumPy package for rank-one Cholesky updates and downdates, implicit modified-factor products, log-determinant updates, and rank-one modified Cholesky solves. It provides Python and C++/pybind11 implementations focused on avoiding unnecessary materialization in rank-one modified workflows.
